marketing.capSubtitle: Native Meta integration, multi-client operations, AI personas, live ranking, and more — already in the product today.
marketing.cap1Body: Describe the ideal profile; AI builds the persona, you review it, then match Meta targeting — custom, lookalike, and saved audiences in one wizard.
marketing.cap1Example: E.g. persona "fit mom 30–45" → validated interests and audience created in-account, without leaving Orion.
marketing.cap2Body: See which hooks, formats, and angles perform — by campaign, account, or client, with live Meta data.
marketing.cap2Example: E.g. compare hooks, formats, and angles by campaign or client — in seconds.
marketing.cap3Body: Learnings, hypotheses, and suggestions accumulate. The more you use it, the faster and sharper the operation gets.
marketing.cap3Example: E.g. "Test CBO with 3 winning creatives" — suggested from client history.
marketing.cap4Body: Create ad copy and text variations with built-in AI — review and publish in your workflow.
marketing.cap4Example: E.g. generate 5 headlines and 3 descriptions for a creative — tweak tone and CTA before launch.
marketing.cap5Body: Polished reports with KPIs, creatives, and insights — client-ready without hours in Canva or PowerPoint.
marketing.cap5Example: E.g. weekly PDF with performance, top creatives, and narrative — generated in one click.
marketing.cap6Body: Connect Business Manager and ad accounts per client. Manage 2 to 30+ clients in one cockpit — metrics, campaigns, and audiences straight from Meta, no spreadsheet exports.
marketing.cap6Example: E.g. three clients with separate accounts — switch context in one click with live data for each.

marketing.dashSectionSubtitle: Real-time KPIs, charts, and Meta metrics for every client — no spreadsheets, no juggling ten tools. All in the dashboard.
marketing.diffSubtitle: Not just another metrics dashboard. It's intelligence that researches, creates, and learns alongside your agency.
marketing.diff1Title: Advanced personas from a single sentence
marketing.diff1Body: Describe your ideal customer in plain language and the AI builds the persona — interests, behaviors, and demographics. Everything is validated live against Meta's targeting catalog and saved to a library you can reuse across clients.
marketing.diff1Point3: Custom, lookalike, and saved audiences in one wizard
marketing.diff2Body: Before it creates, Orion researches. AI scientists investigate competitors, consumers, and trends, then deliver a consolidated dossier with a confidence score. The Commander uses that intelligence to help you build campaigns, audiences, and creatives — proposing actions you approve in one click.
marketing.diff2Point1: Research scientists: Competitor, Consumer, and Trend
marketing.diff2Point2: Consolidated dossier with a confidence score
marketing.diff2Point3: Help building campaigns, audiences, and creatives
marketing.diff2Point4: Actions executed on Meta with your approval
marketing.diff3Body: Build templates with the KPIs and breakdowns each client wants to see, add an AI-generated narrative, and schedule automatic delivery by email or WhatsApp. Consolidate multiple clients into one report and deliver it all under your brand.
marketing.diff3Point3: Scheduled delivery by email or WhatsApp

marketing.aboutSubtitle: Paid traffic cockpit for solo managers and agencies scaling without a fragmented tool stack.
marketing.aboutMissionBody1: Orion was built for performance professionals: centralize Meta data, accelerate decisions with AI, and remove manual work across spreadsheets, reports, and standalone alerts.
marketing.aboutMissionBody2: We don't replace managers or agencies — we provide visibility, automation, and operational memory so you can decide with clarity.
marketing.aboutValue1Body: Suggestions, plans, and customizable automations — you decide what runs and what gets published.
marketing.aboutValue2Body: Dashboard, creative ranking, and alerts designed for people optimizing campaigns every day.
marketing.aboutValue3Body: Clients, Meta accounts, reports, and agency memory in one cockpit.
marketing.aboutValue4Body: Data handling aligned with LGPD, encryption in transit, and workspace access controls.
marketing.aboutIntegrationsBody: Orion currently connects to Meta Ads (Business Manager, ad accounts, pages, and assets). Additional integrations follow the product roadmap.
marketing.aboutComplianceBody: We operate in compliance with LGPD (Brazilian Law 13.709/2018). You can request access, correction, or deletion via support.
marketing.termsIntro: By using Orion Agency, you agree to these terms. Please read them before creating your account.
marketing.termsSection1Body: By accessing or using Orion Agency, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
marketing.termsSection2Body: Orion Agency is a SaaS platform for paid traffic management with dashboard, reports, automations, alerts, and AI features. The current focus is Meta Ads integration.
marketing.termsSection3Body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity under your account. Notify us immediately about unauthorized use.
marketing.termsSection4Body: Plans are described on the pricing page. Billing is recurring (monthly or annual). Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period unless required otherwise by law.
marketing.termsSection5Body: You may not use the platform to violate laws, gain unauthorized access, perform disallowed scraping, or interfere with service operation.
marketing.termsSection6Body: We process personal data under LGPD. You may request access, correction, portability, or deletion through support channels.
marketing.termsSection7Body: By connecting Meta or other services, you authorize access to data required to operate the platform. We are not responsible for third-party API changes.
marketing.termsSection8Body: The service is provided "as is". Our maximum liability, where applicable, is limited to fees paid in the last three months of subscription.
marketing.supportSubtitle: We're here to help with Orion Agency questions, support, or partnerships.
marketing.supportEmailBody: Technical questions, platform access, or feature usage.
marketing.supportPrivacyBody: Requests for access, correction, portability, or deletion of personal data.
marketing.supportFormHint: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you shortly.
marketing.supportFormSent: Message sent! We reply within 48 business hours.
marketing.supportFormError: Could not send right now. Try again or email support@orionagency.com.br.
marketing.supportClosing: Turning campaign data into smarter decisions.
marketing.supportHoursNote: Messages outside business hours are answered on the next business day.
marketing.supportFaq1Q: How do I connect my Meta account?
marketing.supportFaq1A: Go to Settings → Integrations → Meta, click connect, and authorize OAuth. Then use Meta Assets to import accounts and pages.
marketing.supportFaq2A: Yes. Create one client per operation, link Meta accounts, and set up separate dashboards, reports, and automations.
marketing.supportFaq3A: Metrics sync periodically with Meta. Use refresh in the dashboard or assets hub when you need to force a sync.
marketing.supportFaq4A: In Reports, pick client, period, and type (simple or full). Preview on screen and generate a PDF in one click to send to your client.
marketing.supportFaq5Q: How does the free trial work?
marketing.supportFaq5A: The Free plan includes a full 7-day trial. No card required to start.
marketing.supportFaq6Q: How do I cancel my subscription?
marketing.supportFaq6A: In Settings → Plan & billing, cancel renewal. Access continues until the end of the paid period.

client.onboardingIntro: Orion Agency mirrors what you already use in Meta. Think of it like this:
client.onboardingClient: Client = agency contract (e.g. Clínica Bella). Groups accounts, goals, and campaigns for that business.
client.onboardingAdAccount: Ad account = ad spend wallet in Meta, inside a Business Manager. Link the accounts for this client here.
client.onboardingCampaign: Campaign → Ad set → Ad = structure inside the account. You manage this under Campaigns.
client.onboardingSteps: On this client page, do in order: (1) link ad account(s) → (2) save publishing (page + URL) → (3) goals & alerts → (4) sync.

campaignCreator.brainTipSelectClient: Start by choosing the client and ad account to personalize the next steps.
campaignCreator.brainTipLeadsObjective: Lead campaigns often perform best with instant forms or a conversion-optimized landing page.
campaignCreator.brainTipSalesObjective: For Sales, confirm pixel and conversion event before publishing the ad set.
campaignCreator.brainTipSetBudget: Set a realistic daily budget — even modest amounts help calibrate the initial auction.
campaignCreator.brainTipCampaignReady: Solid campaign base. Move on to audience and creatives while keeping your chosen objective.
campaignCreator.brainTipDefineAudience: A well-defined persona or location reduces wasted impressions in the first weeks.
campaignCreator.brainTipAdsetReady: Audience configured. Review age, location, and exclusions before moving to the ad.
campaignCreator.brainTipAddCreative: Ads with a clear image or video tend to earn higher CTR on the first test.
campaignCreator.brainTipAdReady: Creative ready. On review, double-check copy, URL, and call-to-action.
campaignCreator.brainTipReviewStrong: Draft is nearly complete. Do a final budget and audience check before publishing.
campaignCreator.brainTipReviewCheck: Complete the pending fields in the summary to raise your score and reduce rework in Meta.
campaignCreator.brainRecSelectClient: Select a client to cross-check real history with the benchmark and raise estimate confidence.
campaignCreator.brainRecLowConfidence: Confidence is {confidence}% — sync more campaigns or link a client to replace the generic benchmark.
campaignCreator.brainRecBenchmarkImproveData: Estimate uses industry benchmark only. Sync Meta campaigns and name them by objective (e.g. reach, traffic) to calibrate real CPC/CPA.
campaignCreator.brainRecAgencyNoObjectiveMatch: We scanned {scanned} agency campaigns but none matched this objective. Standardize Meta objectives/names or run pilot campaigns.
campaignCreator.brainRecSyncClientCampaigns: This client has no synced campaigns for this objective yet — connect the ad account and wait for sync to compare with agency data.
campaignCreator.brainRecAddCompetitors: Add competitors in the client DNA to enrich Meta Ad Library research with sector references.
campaignCreator.brainRecConfigureMetaAdLibrary: Set SEARCHAPI_API_KEY or META_AD_LIBRARY_ACCESS_TOKEN on the server so Commander can query the Meta Ad Library.
campaignCreator.brainRecLabelCampaignObjective: Use consistent Meta objectives and names (e.g. Awareness → reach/impressions) so agency data enters the next sample.
campaignCreator.brainRecBudgetLowForCpc: At {budget}/day with market CPC ~{cpc}, expect ~{clicks} clicks/day. For stable learning, raise to at least {minBudget}/day (~50 clicks).
campaignCreator.brainRecBudgetHealthyCpc: Budget of {budget}/day covers ~{clicks} clicks at CPC ~{cpc} — enough volume to test creatives in the first 7 days.
campaignCreator.brainRecBudgetLowForCpa: At {budget}/day with market CPA ~{cpa}, you may stay below 1 conversion/day. Consider {minBudget}/day or consolidate into one ad set.
campaignCreator.brainRecBudgetHealthyCpa: Budget of {budget}/day projects ~{conversions} conversions/day at CPA ~{cpa} — keep pixel/event stable before scaling.
campaignCreator.brainRecClientBeatsAgency: Client history beats agency average by ~{pct}%. Replicate winning targeting, placements, and creative format.
campaignCreator.brainRecReplicateBestCampaign: Best reference: "{name}" — copy audience, placements, and creative type from this campaign as your starting point.
campaignCreator.brainRecAgencyMedianTarget: Agency median: {median} ({count} campaigns). Use as an initial bid/budget ceiling and optimize creative if above target.
campaignCreator.brainRecAgencyPlacementOptimize: Based on {count} similar agency campaigns: test Advantage+ placements and compare feed vs. stories/reels in the first A/B.
campaignCreator.brainRecAwarenessReach: Awareness: prioritize reach with frequency cap (2–3/week) and avoid overly narrow audiences at launch.
campaignCreator.brainRecAwarenessCreative: Run 3–4 creative variants (short video + static) — Awareness needs creative volume to lower CPM/CPC.
campaignCreator.brainRecAwarenessPlacements: Enable Advantage+ placements or include Reels/Stories; Awareness often performs better beyond feed-only.
campaignCreator.brainRecTrafficLanding: Traffic: match landing page to the ad and keep LCP fast (<2.5s) — low CPC won't fix high bounce.
campaignCreator.brainRecTrafficAudienceTest: Test broad + interest ad sets with equal budget; scale whichever delivers CPC below forecast.
campaignCreator.brainRecEngagementVideo: Engagement: native 15–30s video or Reels often beat static image CPC for this objective.
campaignCreator.brainRecEngagementCommunity: Drive comments/shares with a clear CTA; avoid external links in primary if the goal is interaction.
campaignCreator.brainRecLeadsForm: Leads: Meta instant form or dedicated LP — minimize fields to hit forecast CPA.
campaignCreator.brainRecLeadsFollowUp: Set up WhatsApp/email follow-up in CRM; cold leads raise effective CPA even with cheap forms.
campaignCreator.brainRecSalesPixel: Sales: validate pixel + Purchase event before publishing; CPA is unreliable without proper attribution.
campaignCreator.brainRecSalesCatalog: For e-commerce, test catalog/DPA with top SKUs — CPA often beats cold traffic campaigns.
campaignCreator.brainRecAppEvent: App: optimize for install or in-app event; install-only CPA can be misleading.
campaignCreator.brainRecAppCreative: Show real app UI in the first 3s of video; generic creatives push CPI above benchmark.
campaignCreator.brainRecDefineAudience: Set geo + age range before creatives — audiences that are too broad inflate CPC early on.
campaignCreator.brainRecAddCreative: Prepare at least 2 creative variants (format + hook) so the algorithm can find CPC below average.
campaignCreator.brainRecReviewBudgetAudience: On review, check budget vs. CPC/CPA forecast and whether placements include Advantage+.

creativesPerf.errorTimeout: The request timed out. Please try again in a moment.
creativesPerf.empty: No creatives with data for this client in the period.
creativesPerf.rankingSubtitle: Find the best and worst creatives per account by campaign type.
creativesPerf.cfgSubtitle: Set, per campaign type, which metric decides the best creative.
creativesPerf.cfgMinImpr: Minimum impressions to enter the ranking
creativesPerf.cfgHelpIntro: Each campaign type uses a single metric to order creatives (there are no combined weights). When you save, card order and scores are recalculated from that metric.
creativesPerf.cfgPlanLimit: Custom ranking configuration isn't included in your plan.
creativesPerf.cfgMinImprHelp: Creatives with fewer impressions than this in the period are excluded from the ranking.
creativesPerf.cfgByCampaignTypeHelp: Choose which metric defines the best creative for each type. Direction indicates whether higher or lower values rank first.
creativesPerf.cfgDirectionCostHint: Cost metrics: lower values rank higher. Creatives without enough results tend to rank lower.
creativesPerf.cfgDirectionVolumeHint: Outcome metrics: higher values rank higher.
creativesPerf.cfgUnusualDirection: Unusual direction for this metric — double-check before saving.
creativesPerf.cfgScoreNote: The score on cards (35–100) reflects rank position, not the raw metric value. Changing criteria reorders creatives and scores follow the new position.
creativesPerf.copyEmpty: No copy available for this creative.
creativesPerf.usageEmpty: Could not locate where this creative is used.
creativesPerf.accessWarningTitle: Missing permission on one or more Meta accounts
creativesPerf.accessWarningBody: Reconnect Meta granting access (ads_read/ads_management) so creatives from these accounts show up:
creativesPerf.accessWarningPartialData: Some creatives loaded from other accounts. The accounts below need attention.
creativesPerf.accessWarningNotGranted: This ad account was not granted during Meta connection. Reconnect and select it in the asset dialog.
creativesPerf.accessWarningNoToken: No workspace member has a valid Meta token for this account.
creativesPerf.accessWarningTokenExpired: The Meta token expired. Reconnect your account.
creativesPerf.accessWarningRateLimit: Meta API rate limit reached. Try again in a few minutes.
creativesPerf.accessActionInviteColleague: Ask a colleague with access to connect Meta in the workspace
creativesPerf.dataCached: Cached data — click Refresh for live data
creativesPerf.showMoreZero: Show creatives with no spend in the period ({n})
creativesPerf.promisingDesc: Spent little but already performing well — worth watching and considering scaling.

chooseAdAccounts.bmHint: Select the business manager. Then you choose its ad accounts.
chooseAdAccounts.accountsHint: Select the accounts from this Business Manager to bring to the dashboard. Each new account becomes a client. Already-linked ones are checked — unchecking removes nothing.
chooseAdAccounts.noAccountsInBm: No accounts in this Business Manager.
chooseAdAccounts.importError: Couldn't import the accounts. Please try again.
chooseAdAccounts.permWarnTitle: Accounts imported, but missing permission on Meta
chooseAdAccounts.permWarnBody: These accounts were linked, but access (ads_read/ads_management) hasn't been granted to the app yet — their data won't appear until you reconnect Meta and grant access to them:
chooseAdAccounts.gotItDashboard: Got it, go to the dashboard →

audienceCreator.selectCategory: Select the category of the audience you want to create.
audienceCreator.customAudienceDesc: Based on interactions with your profile, site, app or customer list.
audienceCreator.lookalikeDesc: Find people with a profile similar to your best customers.
audienceCreator.savedAudienceDesc: Manual targeting by interests, demographics and behaviors.
audienceCreator.typeHint: The chosen type defines which settings will be available in the next steps. You can adjust the details before finishing.
audienceCreator.audienceDetailsDesc: Give it a name and configure the basic audience options.
audienceCreator.audienceRulesDesc: Define the actions and behaviors that qualify a person for this audience.
audienceCreator.processingHint: After creating the audience, it will be sent to Meta for processing. It may take up to <emphasis>30 minutes</emphasis> until it is available for delivery.
audienceCreator.reviewDesc: Confirm all settings before creating the audience.
audienceCreator.audienceSummary: Summary of the audience to be created
audienceCreator.readyHint: All set! Upon confirming, the audience will be created and synced with the ad account of <emphasis>{client}</emphasis> on Meta.
audienceCreator.completenessHint: Fill in all fields to maximize audience quality.
audienceCreator.tipLookalike: 1% lookalike audiences are more precise. Combine with exclusions to avoid duplication.
audienceCreator.tipCustom: Windows of 30–60 days tend to balance size and relevance for most objectives.
audienceCreator.tipSaved: Very broad interests can reduce efficiency. Prefer 3–5 specific interests.
audienceCreator.tipDefault: Choose the audience type to see personalized tips.
audienceCreator.tipRules: Review the time window — shorter periods tend to produce smaller, more qualified audiences.
audienceCreator.tipReview: Check the name, country and rules before sending the audience to Meta.
audienceCreator.setupDesc: Choose the type, name it and configure the basic options.

audiencesMisc.listInfoBanner: Audiences synced directly from Meta. Creatives with fewer than 100 impressions in the period are not included in the classification. Keep your audiences organized to make them easier to use in new campaigns.
audiencesMisc.targetingInterestGroups: {count, plural, one {# interest/behavior group} other {# interest/behavior groups}}
audiencesMisc.targetingCustomAudiences: {count, plural, one {# custom audience included} other {# custom audiences included}}

appFeedback.dbConnectionError: Could not connect to the database (Supabase). Check on Vercel whether DATABASE_URL is set (pooler port 6543 with ?pgbouncer=true) and whether the migrations have been applied.
appFeedback.pageLoadError: An error occurred while loading the page. Please try again.
appFeedback.mockDescriptionBrainInsight: Insight detected by Brain based on the last 14 days.
appFeedback.automationsSubtitle: Create if-then rules to pause, alert, or scale campaigns based on performance.
appFeedback.autopilotSubtitle: Pause what isn't working and get alerts when something goes off track.
appFeedback.stepChooseTriggerDesc: A condition such as CPL above target or spend without conversion.
appFeedback.stepDefineActionDesc: Pause the campaign or just receive an alert.
appFeedback.stepActivateDesc: The rule is evaluated on every sync and acts on its own.
appFeedback.tplPauseHighCplDesc: Pauses the campaign when the cost per lead exceeds the target.
appFeedback.tplCutSpendDesc: Pauses when the campaign spends too much and doesn't deliver.
appFeedback.tplHighCplAlertDesc: Notifies you as soon as the cost per lead exceeds the limit.
appFeedback.tplLowConversionsDesc: Warns when the campaign converts below expectations.
appFeedback.tplScaleWinnersDesc: Increases the budget of campaigns with good ROAS.
appFeedback.tplPauseOffHoursDesc: Turns off campaigns outside business hours.
appFeedback.createCustomRuleHint: Build your own condition and action
appFeedback.noRulesYetHint: Use a template above or create your own. Rules are evaluated on every sync.
